Class LuceneToolIndex

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.tool.toolsearch.index.lucene.LuceneToolIndex
All Implemented Interfaces:
Closeable, AutoCloseable, ToolIndex
public class LuceneToolIndex extends Object implements Closeable, ToolIndex
Lucene-based tool searcher for indexing and searching tool descriptions.

This class provides full-text search capabilities for tool metadata using Apache Lucene's in-memory index. Entries are grouped by sessionId and retrieval is filtered by the provided sessionId.

Since:
2.0.0
Author:
Christian Tzolov

  • Method Details

    • clearIndex

      public void clearIndex(String sessionId)
      Description copied from interface: ToolIndex
      Clears all indexed tools for the specified session.
      Specified by:
      clearIndex in interface ToolIndex
      Parameters:
      sessionId - the session identifier

    • indexTool

      public void indexTool(String sessionId, ToolReference toolReference)
      Description copied from interface: ToolIndex
      Registers a tool in the search index for the specified session.
      Specified by:
      indexTool in interface ToolIndex
      Parameters:
      sessionId - the session identifier for tool isolation
      toolReference - the reference to the tool being indexed

    • indexTools

      public void indexTools(String sessionId, List<ToolReference> toolReferences)
      Description copied from interface: ToolIndex
      Registers multiple tools in the search index for the specified session in a single batch operation.

      Implementations should override this method when a batch operation is more efficient than repeated ToolIndex.indexTool(String, ToolReference) calls (e.g. a single embedding API call or a single write transaction). The default implementation simply iterates and delegates to ToolIndex.indexTool(String, ToolReference).

      Specified by:
      indexTools in interface ToolIndex
      Parameters:
      sessionId - the session identifier for tool isolation
      toolReferences - the tools to register

    • search

      public ToolSearchResponse search(ToolSearchRequest toolSearchRequest)
      Description copied from interface: ToolIndex
      Searches for tools matching the given request criteria.
      Specified by:
      search in interface ToolIndex
      Parameters:
      toolSearchRequest - the search request containing query and parameters
      Returns:
      a response containing matching tool references

    • add

      public void add(String sessionId, String id, String toolName, String toolDescription)
      Adds a single tool to the index for the specified session.

      Thread-safety note: a narrow write-after-close race exists when clearIndex(String) is called concurrently for the same session from a different thread. The advisor's built-in flow prevents this via the atomic fingerprint-check in initializeSession(). Direct callers must ensure that no concurrent clearIndex() runs for the same session; if one does, the document is silently dropped (the session was cleared anyway).

      Parameters:
      sessionId - the session ID associated with the tool
      id - unique identifier for the tool
      toolName - name of the tool
      toolDescription - description of the tool (searchable)

    • commit

      public void commit()
      Commits all pending changes to all session indexes. Call this after batch additions for better performance.

    • commit

      public void commit(String sessionId)
      Commits all pending changes to the index for the specified session. Call this after batch additions for better performance.
      Parameters:
      sessionId - the session ID to commit changes for

    • delete

      public void delete(String sessionId, String id)
      Deletes a tool from the index for the specified session by its ID.
      Parameters:
      sessionId - the session ID
      id - the tool ID to delete

    • size

      public int size(String sessionId)
      Returns the number of documents in the index for the specified session.
      Parameters:
      sessionId - the session ID
      Returns:
      document count, or 0 if session not found

    • totalSize

      public int totalSize()
      Returns the total number of documents across all session indexes.
      Returns:
      total document count
